(define (problem blocksworld-invert-stacks)
  (:domain blocksworld)
  (:requirements :strips)
  (:objects b1 b2 b3 b4 b5 b6 b7 b8 b9 b10 b11 b12 b13 b14 b15)
  (:init
    ;; Tower 1: height 1 (b1 on table)
    (on-table b1)
    (clear b1)
    
    ;; Tower 2: height 1 (b2 on table)
    (on-table b2)
    (clear b2)
    
    ;; Tower 3: height 2 (b3 on table, b4 on b3)
    (on-table b3)
    (on b4 b3)
    (clear b4)
    
    ;; Tower 4: height 3 (b5 on table, b6 on b5, b7 on b6)
    (on-table b5)
    (on b6 b5)
    (on b7 b6)
    (clear b7)
    
    ;; Tower 5: height 8 (b8 on table, b9 on b8, ..., b15 on b14)
    (on-table b8)
    (on b9 b8)
    (on b10 b9)
    (on b11 b10)
    (on b12 b11)
    (on b13 b12)
    (on b14 b13)
    (on b15 b14)
    (clear b15)
    
    ;; Arm is empty
    (arm-empty)
  )
  (:goal
    (and
      ;; Tower 1 inverted: b1 on top (still on table, but now clear from below)
      (on-table b1)
      (clear b1)
      
      ;; Tower 2 inverted: b2 on top (still on table, but now clear from below)
      (on-table b2)
      (clear b2)
      
      ;; Tower 3 inverted: b3 on top, b4 on table
      (on-table b4)
      (on b3 b4)
      (clear b3)

      (on b10 b11)
      (on b9 b10)
      (on b8 b9)
      (clear b8)
      
      ;; Arm is empty
      (arm-empty)
    )
  )
)

    (on-table b1)
    (clear b1)
    
    ;; Tower 2: height 1 (b2 on table)
    (on-table b2)
    (clear b2)

    (on-table b3)
